findings.summary: zsh integer comparison breaks bash -c counting loops — 150+ error lines per scan
findings.evidence: Every file-ranking Bash call produced ~150 'integer expression expected' errors because zsh [ ] doesn't handle grep -c output with newlines. Happened 3 times (rounds 1, 2, 3 file scans).
findings.proposed_fix: Write file-ranking as python3 one-liner or use grep -c piped to sort without zsh [ ] comparison. Add to genomics MEMORY.md.

findings.summary: First agent dispatch rejected by hook — missing turn-budget instruction despite being in CLAUDE.md
findings.evidence: All 4 round-1 agents rejected by PreToolUse:Agent hook. Had to re-dispatch with 'CRITICAL: Stop all searching by your 18th tool call'. Known rule but not applied on first attempt.
findings.proposed_fix: Hook IS the fix — catches the failure. No additional fix beyond existing hook.

findings.summary: bio-verify skill Step 1 only scanned scripts/*.py, missing config/*.json where 80% of coordinate errors lived
findings.evidence: blood_type_panel.json had 4/5 critical errors (80%). Skill grep pattern only targeted scripts/*.py. Fixed in skill update.
findings.proposed_fix: DONE — bio-verify SKILL.md updated to scan config/*.json.

findings.summary: bugfixer agent applied edits but did not commit — had to verify and commit manually
findings.evidence: Bugfixer agent stopped after edits despite prompt saying 'commit with [curation] Fix...'. Parent checked diff and committed.
findings.proposed_fix: When dispatching fix agents, add explicit 'After all edits, run git add + git commit' as final instruction.

findings.summary: Assumed MyVariant.info returns dbsnp.hg38 — it doesn't. Required Ensembl fallback.
findings.evidence: Probe showed no hg38 field in MyVariant response. Implemented Ensembl REST resolver. Probe-first rule (#7) caught it before building.
findings.proposed_fix: No fix needed — probe-first rule worked. Plan risk assessment correctly flagged as MEDIUM with fallback.
